tech: RS232 Protocol, Serial Port Communication, Hardware Integration, ERP Bridge, Signal Processing
title: YAOHUA Digital Weight Scale Integration
description: Industrial hardware integration project connecting YAOHUA XK3190-D# digital weight indicators to LightHouse ERP via RS232 serial communication. The system polls physical weight meters at 200ms intervals, filters signal noise, validates stable weights against 1,500+ die profiles, and pushes accurate weight data directly into ERP â€” eliminating manual data entry and reducing bottlenecks.

images.title: YAOHUA XK3190-D# Indicator
images.desc: Industrial weight indicator hardware with RS232 serial interface used for real-time weight data acquisition.

images.title: Scale Integration Architecture
images.desc: System architecture showing the bridge between YAOHUA weight indicator, serial port middleware, and LightHouse ERP.

images.desc: Monitoring dashboard displaying live weight readings, connection status, and data flow metrics.

images.desc: API module handling serial port connection, baud rate configuration, and data parsing from the weight indicator.

images.title: Serial Port API - Data Stream
images.desc: Real-time data stream processing showing weight values, timestamps, and error handling logic.

images.title: Serial Port API - ERP Bridge
images.desc: Data bridge module that transforms scale readings into ERP-compatible format and pushes to LightHouse database.
